regional_cost_note: Plumbers in Christchurch typically charge $90–$130/hr. Emergency callouts add $80–$150. Post-earthquake, many firms have strong experience in pipe replacement and reticulation.

businesses.name: Walton Plumbing
businesses.known_for: Canterbury's longest-running plumbing firm since 1931; 24-hour emergency service with 15-minute callback guarantee.

businesses.name: Clyne & Bennie Plumbing
businesses.known_for: 65+ year firm with 75+ certified plumbers and gasfitters; NZ Master Plumber of the Year award winner.

businesses.name: A1 Plumbing Services
businesses.known_for: Led by Kerry with 30+ years experience; fast, reliable residential and commercial plumbing since 2012.

businesses.name: Integrity Plumbing
businesses.known_for: Licensed and certified plumbers; transparent pricing and reliable scheduling for residential and commercial jobs.

businesses.name: Christchurch Plumbing Specialists
businesses.known_for: Specialists in hot water systems, bathroom renovations, and new builds across greater Christchurch.
